topics.title: Data Integrity Fixes
topics.summary: A significant fix was merged to address data anomalies in charts, ensuring accurate rendering based on selected date ranges. This update resolves issues related to overlapping weeks and boundaries, enhancing the reliability of data visualization.

topics.title: User Interface Improvements
topics.summary: Recent updates have enhanced the user interface by fixing keyboard shortcut highlighting in search bars. The changes ensure that keyboard shortcuts are more accessible and visually clear, improving user experience and interaction with the application.

topics.title: Code Quality Enhancements
topics.summary: Recent pull requests have focused on improving code quality, including fixes for code line highlighting in light themes. These enhancements contribute to a more polished and user-friendly coding environment.

topics.title: Translation Updates
topics.summary: The project has seen an update in Czech translations, ensuring that the application is more accessible to Czech-speaking users. This improvement reflects the ongoing commitment to localization and user inclusivity.
